overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting artificial lighting, towering buildings with holographic advertisements, and an industrial backdrop with smokestacks.

vehicle passes by on the left side of the street

tall street light with warm orange glow illuminating the fog
palm tree lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a third-person view of a character walking down a foggy futuristic city street at night. The camera transitions to first-person as the character exits the frame, continuing to walk along the wet sidewalk. The DYNALAND tower dominates the right side of the view, while street lights cast an orange glow through the fog. A vehicle passes by on the left as the camera moves forward.

events.description: turning right at the street intersection
red car passes by on the street ahead

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking toward a fenced industrial area with smokestacks in the background

entered.detail: metal security fence with horizontal bars surrounding the industrial complex
industrial smokestacks emitting smoke into the foggy sky
painted white crosswalk lines on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at an intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto a crosswalk. The DYNALAND tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the view opens toward an industrial area surrounded by metal fencing. Industrial smokestacks are visible in the foggy distance, and a red car passes by on the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with large holographic billboard

events.description: turning left around the building corner
large green holographic billboard displaying a wireframe map comes into view

agents.ego_description: turning left around the corner and walking past a glowing green digital billboard

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cube-shaped holographic display showing a green wireframe map
concrete barriers with red and white hazard stripes
orange industrial trash can on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Turning left around a building corner, the camera reveals a large glowing green holographic billboard displaying a wireframe map. The DYNALAND tower recedes into the distance on the left. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction, passing concrete barriers and an orange trash can lining the sidewalk.

events.description: crossing the street toward the illuminated tunnel entrance
approaching the lit underpass entrance with industrial skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking toward a tunnel entrance with industrial smokestacks visible in the foggy background

entered.detail: illuminated underpass entrance with bright overhead lights
concrete retaining wall along the sidewalk edge
tall industrial buildings with smokestacks silhouetted against the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street toward an illuminated tunnel entrance, with the DYNALAND tower now visible on the right side of the frame. Industrial buildings with smokestacks loom in the foggy background. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a retaining wall, approaching the underpass as the scene becomes more industrial.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, neon-lit city street that gradually transitions into a stark industrial zone. It begins with a shift from a third-person view to a first-person perspective as the camera moves along a wet sidewalk under an orange glow, with the DYNALAND tower looming to the right. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the view opens toward a fenced industrial area where smokestacks emerge from the fog and a red car passes ahead. The scene then shifts left around a building corner to reveal a glowing green holographic wireframe map, passing a pedestrian and concrete barriers while the tower recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera crosses the street and follows a concrete retaining wall toward an illuminated tunnel entrance, with the industrial skyline and smokestacks dominating the background.
